list.name: 3PA
list.about:
At 3PA, we’re passionate about delivering reliable, high-performance solutions for the plastics processing industry. 

Since our founding in 2005, we’ve supported manufacturers across the UK with expert advice, quality machinery, and bespoke automation systems — from injection and blow moulding equipment to custom conveyor designs. 

Our experienced team combines technical knowledge with hands-on support to ensure every project runs smoothly, from initial consultation through installation and aftercare. 

Built on a reputation for integrity, innovation, and service excellence, 3PA continues to help our customers achieve greater efficiency and productivity in every aspect of their operations.

list.name: Abbey Polymers
list.about: Founded in 1996, Abbey Polymers has grown into a leading supplier of high-quality engineering thermoplastics, specialising in soft materials such as thermoplastic elastomers (TPE) and thermoplastic polyurethanes (TPU), as well as flame-retardant compounds. With a long-standing reputation for delivering innovative and reliable material solutions, we serve a diverse range of industries, including automotive, medical, electronics, and consumer goods. Our success is built on a foundation of technical expertise, customer focus, and a commitment to providing cutting-edge materials that meet the evolving needs of modern industries.

list.name: Advanced Plastics Group
list.about:
The Advanced Plastics Group is the parent company for three UK based injection moulding businesses.

Accredited to ISO9001, IATF16949 & ISO14001.

Advanced Plastics NE (Hull) 

  • Injection moulding machines from 50 tonne to 1,600 tonne.
  • 6 axis robotics on all machines, with full automated cells.
  • Plastic welding, ultrasonic, spin, heat stake, vibration.
  • FIP seals with full automation.
  • Overmoulding, insert moulding.
  • Assembly.
  • Centralised feed system.
  • ERP system.
  • Vision technology for inline QA.
  • CNC controlled CMM

Advanced Plastics STH (Fareham)

  • Injection moulding machines from 22 tonne to 400 tonne.
  • Assembly & full kitting.
  • Aluminium vacuum metalising.

Advanced Plastics NW (Manchester)

  • Injection moulding machines from 35 tonne to 270 tonne.
  • Assembly & full kitting.
  • Automated packing systems for high volume moulding.

list.name: Aero Fibre
list.about: Empowering Sustainability Through Waste Transformation. Aero Fibre Pvt Ltd is pioneer manufacturer in recycling the waste plastic materials, for a decade and converting it into a new shape and size for reusable. Committed to environmental stewardship, we specialize in converting waste into valuable resources, driving a circular economy. Join us in redefining waste management for a greener future." We are fully committed to unmatched quality with our cutting-edge technology. Our total quality management system and stringent quality check ensure that every product is of highest standard.

list.name: Aimplas Plastics Technology Centre
list.about:
AIMPLAS – Plastics Technology Centre has more than 35 years of experience in the plastics industry. We provide solutions to companies throughout the entire value chain, from raw material manufacturers to plastic processors and end users.
Our purpose is building a better world by fostering sustainable innovation around plastics to help businesses create wealth and jobs and contribute to social challenges.
We have over 12,000 m² of facilities equipped with cutting-edge technology, including more than 35 pilot plants to test all plastic processing applications: thermoplastic, thermoset, and composite processing. Our laboratories hold the highest number of accreditations for plastics according to the UNE-EN ISO/IEC 17025 standard.

list.name: Albis (UK) Ltd
list.about: ALBIS is one of the world's leading globally operating companies in the distribution of technical thermoplastics and thermoplastic elastomers. With technical know-how, a strong distribution network and a passion for the best solution, ALBIS offers its customers as an independent distributor one of the market-leading and most comprehensive product portfolios for the entire plastics processing industry. With 24 locations worldwide and 500 employees, the company, headquartered in Hamburg, Germany, is strongly represented in Europe with a growing presence in EMEA and Asia Pacific. For more information visit http://www.albis.com

list.name: Alkegen
list.about: Alkegen is an innovation-driven leader focused on battery technologies, filtration media, specialty insulation and more. Our RapidFire Heater Band radiant heaters, previously known as Rex Materials’ TCS, represent the next generation in barrel heating for injection molding.  RapidFire provides substantial CO2 reduction, via outstanding energy savings, as well as the ability to rapidly cool-down and more quickly start-up machines.  In addition, improved temperature control creates a safer, more comfortable work environment to aid in employee retention.  At Alkegen, we’re delivering products that enable the world to breathe easier, live greener, and go further than ever before.

list.name: Alliance Fibres Ltd
list.about: We Alliance Fibres Ltd (Surat – Gujarat, India) Estd. 2006 are pleased to introduce us as a leading manufacturer of r-PET FLAKES ,r-PSF, Recycled POY/DTY/FDY/ATY/ACY, PET Ropes & Recycled Polyester Fabrics from 100% Post-consumer PET waste. We are manufacturing high-grade clear and Green r-PET Flakes from 100% Post-consumer PET waste. Please find attached the brochure for your reference along with PET Flakes Picture and TDS. We have a food-grade compliant manufacturing facility with the latest technology for high-quality r-PET Flakes. We are supplying REACH & SVHC-compliant rPET flakes on request. We have GRS, OBP (Ocean Bound Plastic), ISO & Sedex certifications. We can supply PET Flakes samples on request to test the quality. Let us know your requirements to start a business with you on a long-term basis. We are exporting about 1500 MT r-PET Flakes all over the globe in various industries such as Bottle-to-bottle & Textile grade chips, r-PET Sheets and Films, etc. Also, We are manufacturing r-PP/r-HDPE Flakes & Granules.

list.name: Alpha Omega Pack Factory L.L.C.
list.about:
Alpha Omega Pack Factory, is an ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and ISO 45001:2018 certified leading manufacturer of plastic and packaging solutions in the GCC region. Established in 1998, the company has grown from humble beginnings to become a leading name in the industry, recognized for its unwavering commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability.

Operating out of a highly advanced facility in Umm Al Quwain, United Arab Emirates, Alpha Omega Pack Factory provides a wide range of high-quality products to more than 700 clients across the Middle East and Africa, making a significant impact in the region’s packaging industry. Certified to the HACCP CAC/RCP 1-1969 standard, our company ensures the highest level of food safety and quality management.

Our Aluminium Food Containers are SGS-certified, ensuring full compliance with the European Commission Regulation (EU) 2020/1245 standard for food-grade safety.

We cater to diverse industries, including logistics, hospitality, catering, cleaning, and government sectors.

We are amongst the few manufacturers with ECAS Oxo-biodegradable certified products, fully complying with UAE Standard S. 5009:2009 – reflecting our dedication towards reducing the environmental impact of plastic waste.

We actively reduce plastic waste by recycling a volume of over 500 tons of plastic monthly, minimizing landfill impact and promoting sustainability.

The company provides white labeling services, allowing clients to customize and brand products according to their specific requirements. Our custom solutions and prompt, reliable service have earned us a reputation for excellence and customer satisfaction.

list.name: AMI - Marketing for Manufacturing
list.about:
We help manufacturing and engineering companies get more from their marketing.

AMI works exclusively with manufacturers, which means we understand your world, your customers and what actually drives enquiries. When it comes to websites, we cover everything from simple, cost-effective, fast-turnaround designs to more complex, fully bespoke builds. Alongside that, we deliver video, factory & component photography, SEO/GEO, paid ads and social media. Everything we do is designed to make your business appear credible, professional and trustworthy online.

We spend a lot of time on factory floors, not just behind screens, and we pride ourselves on being easy to work with, straight-talking and focused on getting you results.

If you’re uninspired by your current website, frustrated with marketing that isn’t delivering or just want an honest conversation about what could work better - come and have a chat with us.

list.name: Amut Comi
list.about: Partner with Plastics Machinery Group, which is headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, Plastics Machinery Group is a leader in the plastics industry by providing the highest quality machinery and service to its plastic processing customers. Our team of Certified Machinery and Equipment Appraisers specialize in thermoforming equipment, injection molding equipment, blow molding equipment, extrusion, grinders / shredders as well as plastic auxiliary products.

list.name: Anglo Plastics Ltd
list.about:
Used Plastics Machinery Dealers with over 40 years of experience in the industry. We specialise in profile and pipe extrusion machinery, and we also supply recycling and compounding equipment. We have a large inventory of stock in our two warehouses. We ship equipment around the world to any market.We supply various ancillaries, including screws & barrels and spare parts, PLC conversions, factory clearances, big or small undertaken.


 

Anglo Plastics Ltd have got over 40 years of plastics industry experience, unrivalled product knowledge, large inventory of stock in our warehouse ready to ship, all backed by first class customer service and value. We ship plastics machinery around the world to every market and aim to provide you with anything from plastic extruders and haul offs, to spare parts for saws and cutters.

list.name: Applied Coating Technologies Ltd
list.about: Specialists in the application of decorative and functional coatings across all industries. For over 22-years, we have been working with our customers and trusted suppliers to develop sustainable and efficient solutions, specific to your project requirements. Supported by extensive manual spray facilities, as well as 4 fully robotic paint lines, we can process both low to high volume applications. Established in 2000, to deliver superior levels of quality and service in the application of conductive paints to provide EMI/RFI protection. Our ethos to remain committed to continuous improvement and product development, has led to the expansion of our business from an applicator of EMI/RFI shielding solutions, to an industry leader in the application of functional and decorative coatings for a far-reaching collection of products. As our business grew in size, as did our technologies, facilities and services. The addition of robotic paint plants, paved the way for our introduction into the automotive industry, coating for both interior and exterior trim. Advancing further, to add stronger manual spray facilities, UV curing paint lines, printing capabilities and more efficient robotic spray plants. Over the past 20 years we have established strong and trusted partnerships with our critical suppliers. This enables us to offer you the best in product, service and value; as well as extending our services to encompass end-to-end solutions. By offering flexible manufacturing processes and on-hand support from our extensive technical team, who have over 35 years’ experience in developing coating solutions, we can assist you in realising your design aspirations.

list.name: Aquapurge Ltd
list.about: Committed to increasing your productivity. Aquapurge manufacture and develop purging compounds for the plastics industry. Our purging compounds are used in the plastics industry to change colour, change material, remove carbon and aid in strip down maintenance.

list.name: ARBURG Ltd
list.about: ARBURGadditive: Customised 3D printing with the ARBURG freeformer, featuring the ARBURG Plastic Freeforming (APF) technology, and innovatiQ 3D printers, using fused filament fabrication (FFF) and liquid additive manufacturing (LAM) technologies. With the open freeformer system, you fully control the process, and can adjust and optimise layer separation, droplet size and all parameters to obtain the required end product characteristics. (ARBURG Plastic Freeforming) Furthermore, you can use the same commercially available plastic pellets as for injection moulding and thus print functional parts in your range of certified, original materials. Thanks to the fully flexible process control, the freeformer can print components in TPE or hard/soft combinations, as well as complex geometries or integrated functions. Proud to be part of ARBURG, one of the world’s leading manufacturers of high-end injection moulding machines for plastics processing, ensuring your success with a 'state of the art' manufacturing plant, situated in the Black Forest, Germany. We provide our customers with a comprehensive range of digital platforms through our digital offering in arburgXworld (aXw) and sustainability is at the core of what we offer in terms of circular ecconomy and resource conservation through our arburgGREENworld phylosophy. Come and talk to us, we look forward to it!

list.name: Axion Polymers
list.about: We produce a range of highly-specified Axpoly recycled plastics that match virgin polymer in performance. Our polymer products derive from carefully-segregated and controlled waste material streams originating from end-of-life vehicles and waste electrical goods. All materials re-processing takes place on our own plants here in the UK, under the control of Axion’s skilled operating and quality assurance team. Specifying Axpoly polymers offers significant carbon savings compared with virgin polymers and contributes towards your sustainability targets. Axion Polymers is part of leading British metals recycler, S. Norton.

list.name: Begg & Co.
list.about: Begg & Co are one of the oldest Independent distributors in the UK of Plastic Raw Materials.We are a privately owned, family run business and have been trading since 1956.

list.name: Beijing Neogreen
Biesterfeld Petroplas Ltd
list.about:
Biesterfeld Petroplas - Your Distribution Partner for Plastics, Rubber and Specialty Chemicals 

Biesterfeld Petroplas has been distributing polymers across the United Kingdom and Ireland since its foundation in 1986. The Biesterfeld Group is an international trading and service company with an annual turnover of €1.4 bn and more than 1000 employees, founded in 1906. 

The group is now active in more than 50 locations throughout Europe, North and South America as well as Asia. Biesterfeld Petroplas has partnerships with some of the world’s largest producers of both commodity and engineering polymers. These partnerships have been developed over many years, which have allowed us to develop and maintain a wide ranging portfolio of polymer products to serve all industries. Some of these suppliers include Delrin, Celanese, CP Chem, LG Chem, DuPont, Syensqo, ExxonMobil, Chimei, Dow, SK Chemicals, BASF and Plastic Bank. 

Furthermore Biesterfeld Petroplas offers speciality chemical products and solutions through solid application expertise, formulation know-how and a product portfolio carefully tailored to the needs of selected industries. With a highly experienced and technical sales team, we offer unparalleled service levels to our customers. We have logistics partners strategically placed across the UK & Ireland, allowing us to offer a competitive, flexible service in line with our customers’ expectations.

list.name: Billion
list.about: A vast experience Created by Mr. Léon Billion in 1949, the company has a vast experience in plastics injection molding machine design and manufacture. In addition to standard thermoplastics IMM, Billion specializes in multi-injection equipment, and has developed numerous specific plastics processing solutions. An international team Billion is a solution provider and a service partner for plastics processors worldwide. Headquarters are located in French Plastics Vallée in the heart of Europe, whereas a large network of subsidiaries and agents represent our know-how and expertise on an international basis. Our flexibility, fast response time and extraordinary service create extra value to our customers.

list.name: BioCote Ltd
list.about: BioCote® is a worldwide market-leading antimicrobial additives supplier with an established history of over 25 years. Trusted by leading brands and manufacturers of plastic products, BioCote® takes pride in its technology being recognised for its quality, traceability, and credibility all around the world. BioCote®’s extensive portfolio of antimicrobial additives includes silver, zinc, and organic compounds, as well as combinations such as silver/zinc blends. Working without an off switch, the technology has demonstrated an 86% reduction in microbes in only 15 minutes and a 99.99% reduction in 24 hours. The antimicrobial additives can be easily and cost-effectively integrated into a wide variety of polymer materials, formulations, and polymer blends during manufacturing without affecting the colour or mechanical properties of the material. Offering an extensive variety of antimicrobial additives for engineering plastics and commodity polymers in concentrated powder or masterbatch pellets, the company has the capability to create bespoke polymer-specific masterbatches to meet any moulding or extrusion process. Designed to have antimicrobial efficacy at low dosage rates, BioCote®’s powder and masterbatch additives do not affect the overall structure of a polymer. This means, if a polymer is recyclable, the addition of BioCote® will not influence its recyclability. ⁠What’s even better, once incorporated into a product, BioCote®’s additives work continuously to protect against odour formation, staining and material degradation caused by microbes. This ultimately helps to prevent early product failure and can reduce the output of resources in manufacturing due to there being fewer, but better quality, products being made – a shift from quantity to quality that is key to progressing towards sustainable production. At BioCote®, we are committed to making a real difference to any business by working with our customers to deliver distinctive, high-value products to market. Partnering with BioCote® brings additional benefits, such as a comprehensive support package from our multi-disciplined team of antimicrobial specialists, a 24/7 Partner Portal, or brand affiliation with other well-known BioCote® partners. BioCote® is more than just an antimicrobial additive supplier. We believe in an open, consultative approach to antimicrobial product integration, continuously working in partnership with our customers from product development to market entry and beyond.

list.name: Bjørn Thorsen A/S
list.about: Bjørn Thorsen A/S is an expanding group of companies aiming to achieve long-term sustainability and profitability, while anchored on competitive distribution of specialty raw materials with additional customized own product solutions. Our core activity is distribution of raw materials from leading chemical manufactures to customers in different industries. Today, we are covering the following distribution areas: Nordics, Baltics, UK, Ireland, and France. In addition, we have set up an active presence in China by launching the joint venture BT Solutions Zhuhai Co., Ltd. (BT Solutions) in 2019. Our warehouses are strategically located in Denmark, Sweden, Finland, the United Kingdom, France, the United States and China. We are known in the market for our capabilities to develop new market segments and opportunities for our principals. This is done by excellent market research, providing customized solutions and technical support.

list.name: B & J Parr
list.about:
With over 50 years in Business, B & J Parr is one of the largest independent plastic recyclers in the UK.

Based in East Midlands, we operate from a purpose built, 5-acre site equipped with state-of-the-art processing and analytical technology. 

We specialise in the recycling of plastics; granulating, compounding and pulverising - providing reliable, high-quality, and sustainable solutions for a wide range of industries. 

We process and purchase all types of plastics — including LDPE, HDPE, Pipe and Fittings, PP, ABS, Styrene, and Nylon.

We are committed to helping our customers reduce waste and close the recycling loop. 

Our key services include: 

Recycling & Toll Processing

Converting plastic waste and customer-supplied materials into reusable forms to support a circular economy.

Pulverising

Processing both recycled and virgin plastics into specific micron sizes for use in rotational moulding, masterbatch, and related applications.  

Custom Bag Manufacturing

Supplying fully bespoke, UK-produced bags made predominantly from reclaimed plastics.  

At B & J Parr, we take pride in combining technical expertise with a personal approach — delivering sustainable, customer-focused solutions that help businesses achieve their production and environmental goals.

list.name: BMB S.p.A.
list.about: BMB manufactures high performance, high precision injection moulding machines for the plastics industry. Based in Brescia, Northern Italy with a subsidiary in Halesowen in West Midlands. We offer Full Electric, Hybrid and Hydraulic Injection Moulding Machines from 70t - 4,000t clamp force. We welcome your enquiry and look forward to demonstrating our machine technology in the following sectors: packaging, caps, automotive, medical technical and PET markets

list.name: B&M Longworth (Edgworth) Ltd
list.about: We are component cleaning experts, with over 45 years of experience in our field, and a strong commitment to working in a way that helps the planet. In a nutshell, we: 1, Clean things 2, Build things that clean things, and send them all over the world 3, Are developing a brand new exciting recycling technology We work with many industries, including Aerospace and automotive Food manufacturing Oil and gas Packaging Polymer manufacturing and handling Pharmaceutical & medical Recycling Textiles We hold the ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management accreditation, and employ a wide range of cleaning methods, including aqueous and ultrasonics, burn off pyrolysis ovens, cleaning for oxygen use, and our own patented super heated steam cleaning technology, DEECOM. Oh, and we are also working to help clean up the world, with the reclamation of - amongst other things - polymers, and carbon fibre. We're on stand C35 in Hall 4, if you'd like to come and say hello. 🙂🌍🌱♻️

list.name: Bole Machinery
list.about: Launched in 2018 Bole Machinery UK, as part of the Bole European subsidiary, is now becoming the fastest growing brand of injection moulding machines in the UK and Ireland, with machines supplied into various sectors/industries such as automotive, medical, packaging and housewares. Our European designed machines range from 50T-6800T, across our servo-hydraulic toggle (EKS), servo-hydraulic Twin Platen (DK) and Full electric (FE) series, all using high spec proven European components. Stock machines up to 350T held in our centrally located show room, with larger tonnage machines available from our European subsidiary. All machine purchases are backed by our standard 3 year warranty covering parts and labour, supported by our UK based Bole trained engineers. All machines are Industry 4.0 ready. Working with established ancillary suppliers we are able to offer full turn key solutions. Let your problem become our solution. For further information on our range of machinery and service contracts, please get in touch with the UK team. Hardeep Khera - General Manager - hardeep@bolemachinery.co.uk Matt Holyoake - UK Sales - matt@bolemachinery.co.uk Be Better, Buy Bole

list.name: Borche Machinery (UK) Co., Ltd
list.about: Borch Machinery Co., Ltd. (Borche) specialises in research and development, manufacturing and selling intelligent injection moulding machines (IMM). Now Borche has TWO manufacturing bases: Guangzhou headquarters with R&D and manufacturing base, and Guangzhou Intelligent manufacturing demonstration plant of Two-Platen machine. In total, Borche has premises of 215,000 square meters and has more than 800 employees. Borche always stays ahead with world-class technology. We have developed more than 100 different kind of products, covering Bi Servo series, BU Two Platen Series, BM Multi-component series, BH High Speed series, BD Full Electric Series. Our UK Operation is based in Kingswinford near Birmingham, for sales, shipping and storage. We can plan and deliver your manufacturing solution to successful testing and running to ensure your investment is running smoothly following installation.

list.name: BOY LIMITED
list.about: BOY is a leading producer of fully-hydraulic injection moulding machines with a clamping force up to 1,250 kN that are designed for the fully automatic processing of thermoplastics, elastomers, silicones, PIM, hotmelt and many other plastic materials. BOY stands for maximum economy, best energy efficiency through low energy consumption and reliable quality - Made in Germany. The compact design, the servo motor pump drive and the cantilevered two platen locking system are features that mark this product at the top of the plastic processing industry. Since 1968, BOY has shipped more than 40,000 injection moulding machines worldwide.

list.name: British Plastics Federation
list.about:
The British Plastics Federation (BPF) is the most powerful voice in the UK plastic industry with over 600 members across the UK plastics industry supply chain, including polymer producers and suppliers, additive manufacturers, recyclers, services providers, end users, plastics processors and machinery manufacturers, representing over 80% of the industry by turnover.
The BPF promotes its members and provides a strong voice for the UK plastics industry.
The BPF also runs a number of online platforms, including PolymerJobs.co.uk and PolymerCourses.com.

list.name: Broadwater Mouldings Ltd
list.about: With an experienced and highly skilled team offering engineering solutions in the manufacture and supply of Glass Reinforced Plastic (GRP) mouldings, Thermoforming and assemblies, Broadwater have accumulated considerable expertise, providing a service spanning many industries worldwide.

list.name: Broadway
list.about: Established over a quarter of a century ago, Broadway is a trusted manufacturer of colour and effect masterbatches, additive masterbatches, plastic compounds and rotational moulding powders. Our materials are used in many market sectors and are supplied to plastic moulders across the UK, Europe and beyond. Many household brands have chosen to specify our accurate and consistent colourants for use in the manufacture of their plastic packaging. We’re situated in the Suffolk countryside, reachable in around 135 minutes from London Liverpool Street. Our well-equipped site and experienced team allow us to provide high-quality materials, tailored to customers’ unique requirements. Custom colours can be matched within three to five working days and production orders are typically dispatched within just five working days. We also stock a universal masterbatch range of 122 colours, often available on next day deliveries. We pride ourselves on offering fast lead times, great value products and exceptional service.

list.name: Bruker UK Limited
list.about: Bruker is enabling scientists to make breakthrough discoveries and develop new applications that improve the quality of human life. Bruker’s high-performance scientific instruments and high-value analytical and diagnostic solutions enable scientists to explore life and materials at molecular, cellular and microscopic levels. In close cooperation with our customers, Bruker is enabling innovation, improved productivity and customer success in life science molecular research, in applied and pharma applications, in microscopy and nanoanalysis, and in industrial applications, as well as in cell biology, preclinical imaging, clinical phenomics and proteomics research and clinical microbiology. Today, worldwide more than 8500 employees are working on this permanent challenge at over 90 locations on all continents. Bruker continues to build upon its extensive range of products and solutions, its broad base of installed systems and a strong reputation among its customers. Being one of the world's leading analytical instrumentation companies, Bruker is strongly committed to further fully meet its customers’ needs as well as to continue to develop state-of-the-art technologies and innovative solutions for today's analytical questions.

list.name: Carst and Walker UK
CD Automation UK Ltd
list.about: CD Automation create product solutions that solve many of today’s machine frustrations. If you use single or 3 phase to power your electrical process, whether its a multi-zone plastic extrusion line, or a hot runner for injection moulding then we can help with our comprehensive range of quality thyristor (SCR) power controllers & systems.

list.name: CHESS Plastics
list.about: Chess Plastics are an injection moulding company with 21 modern machines offering the full range of services required- Design-Tooling- Production-Assembly - Packing - Despatch

list.name: CJP Sales Ltd / Dyna-Purge
list.about: Everything we do, we believe in traditional values of trading - where people do what they say they are going to do-  where your business needs are in safe hands. At CJP we are a family run business with a committed team, providing solutions to our customers polymer supply and scrap management needs. We see ourselves as more than just a distributor- we have been in business for over 40 years and have a warehouse with 500 tonne of polymer stock. We have developed our core business of distribution into becoming a specialist, technical supplier of all plastic raw materials and purge compounds. Visit our stand and see how we can help you!

list.name: CJ Tool and Mouldings
list.about:
People | Product | Partnership

From concept to component, CJ are your trusted partner for high-quality plastic parts.

At CJ Tool & Mouldings, we specialise in precision plastic injection moulding, tooling manufacture, assembly, pad printing, and ultrasonic welding, all delivered under one roof at our West Midlands facility.

We’re proud to be the trusted partner to product designers, design engineers, and businesses across the UK, offering flexible batch volumes, fast turnaround times, and deep technical expertise to bring your ideas to life.

Looking to reshore tooling from overseas? We’re reshoring experts, making tool transfer and modification simple, seamless, and stress-free.

Get in touch today to discuss how our capabilites could bring your plastic products to life.

list.name: Cold Jet
list.about: DRY ICE BLASTING & PRODUCTION EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURER We solve the world’s cleaning and transport cooling problems with products and services that are environmentally sustainable, do not add to the generation of waste streams, and are occupationally safe. Our dry ice cleaning and dry ice production products put recycled CO2 to work – replacing harmful processes with a water-free, waste-free, and chemical-free solution. Solutions for your pain points in plastics processing Dry ice blasting helps plastic manufacturers reduce scrap and downtime, improve product quality, prolong the life of their equipment, and increase profitability. Dry ice cleaning provides a non-abrasive method to safely clean molds online at operating temperatures. Improve product quality Clean in-placeLittle to no disassembly required Non-abrasiveNo damage to molds Reduce scrapCleaner molds lead to higher quality Reduce production downtimeClean quicker and without cooldown Decrease cleaning time and labor costs Eliminate painstaking manual cleaning

list.name: Colorservice MASTERBATCH automation
list.about: Color Service is the world leader in the production and development of Automatic Dosing Systems for powder and liquid products, able to solve problems associated with the manual weighing and to abandon traditional production methods that inevitably would not allow to get a safe, fast and precise dosing. The company was founded in 1987 from the owner and founder Fabrizio Toschi who, coming from a 20 years of experience as a technical manager of dyeing, is deeply familiar with the production problems of every day and has allowed the study and development of the fundamental concepts of automation for the textile market. Over the years the production range has expanded to other markets such as Plastic, Tire, Technical Rubber and Cosmetic consolidating its position with over 2.500 systems installed all over the world.
